insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rebound next period — App Total New Subs +0.2%, led by YMK.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +0.2% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User -5.2%, App Total Install -15.4%; Δ +10.5pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. App Total Revenue is currently -0.8%, so this points to a rebound, not continued weakness. The lift is concentrated in YMK (+21.7%); YCP is -19.6%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's +3.8% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-16 vs 07-09 = +3.8% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-09 vs 07-02 = -3.8% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK surging (+21.7% vs upstream -1.5%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK +21.7% vs upstream -1.5% (conversion surging); YCP -19.6% vs upstream -6.9% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Install down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Install is down across every app (All App -15.4%, YMK -1.4%, YCP -5.8%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
